---
title: "Ideas"
labels: ["enhancement"]
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        Share an idea for future project direction, examples, reproducibility improvements, or integration support.
  - type: textarea
    id: idea
    attributes:
      label: Idea
      description: Describe the idea clearly and concretely.
    validations:
      required: true
  - type: textarea
    id: motivation
    attributes:
      label: Why it matters
      description: Explain the user need, scientific workflow, or pain point behind the idea.
---
